review_text:
being young I felt unwelcome from the start.
One of the employees that worked there was rude and unprofessional from the get go, would not recommend camping here.
Nice park, amenities are clean but dated.
Smaller sites but great location and the managers lovely

As much as I love the Tropic Caravan Park, this 5 star review is for the managers of the park, Tania and Josh!

My boyfriend and I have been staying here for two seasons now, and Tania & Josh are the sole reason our experience was, is and continues to be so positive. Together, they go above and beyond in ways that simply cannot be taught—their generosity and dedication to the guests and the park are unmatched. It’s rare to find managers who care so much about the people around them. Any business would be incredibly lucky to have them, and they deserve to be recognized and valued for the immense level of work they put in everyday. The park would not be the same without these guys and I am forever grateful for the care they have provided us! Thank you Tania & Josh for making our home a peaceful space to live in, you guys are the absolute best!!!
Unfortunately we could not stay long, but what an amazing little caravan park this is. Close to the beach, a nice little swimming pool, good showers and friendly people. We'll be back!
A lovely little caravan park. The hosts were very friendly and helpful. Amenities old but clean. Excellent location. Caravan sites are a bit tight
Very kind and clean spot. We really enjoyed our stay. Thank you.

Caravan park needs some serious work! It was however clean,  just old! And the grounds need drainage done ect. They only allowed us to go into one of the outside parks as apparently the inner ones where for camper vans ect yet 2 days later we see a caravan in one. Lastly the permanents on south side there need a good shake up they where run down and feral and all I could smell was ‘dope’ wafting  🤦‍♀️

A really, really great campground! Just a short walk into town, two minutes to the beach, and excellent facilities as well as great sites. For us, it was the best campground we stayed at. The owners are incredibly friendly and go out of their way to make everyone feel welcome. We especially loved that the park is comfortably small and not too big. We would definitely recommend it and will be back! 🙏🏼

We stayed as a family in a cabin, it was a clean comfortable stay. The facilities are dated but everything works and is clean. The cabin furniture and appliances have been updated. |The most amazing thing is the location for the price you pay - walking distance to the beach and town.  The New splash park is located out the back gate, our kids had a ball. We used to pool everyday and camp kitchen rather than cooking in the room, we found everyone (staff and fellow travellers) to be friendly. Looking forward to returning.
Dicht bij het centrum
The best thought out and stocked camp kitchen of anywhere I've ever stayed! Awesome location and friendly staff.
Très bien placé, calme et commodités très bien.
Great 3day stay toilet shower spotless nice little pool close to beach and harbour camp kitchen great would recommend
Blisko miasta czysto polecam

Cabin was good basic but had everything we needed
Walking distance to beach and town
New water park perfect for young kids

En voyage en Australie pour quelque temps, je n'ai pas été particulièrement impressionné par ce camping. J'ai déjà fait plusieurs campings en Australie, ce qui me permet de faire des comparaisons. L'emplacement est super, la plage, l'espace de jeu d'eau pour les enfants et la rue principale sont à 5 minutes à pied. Les emplacements sont petits, ce qui est parfois le cas ici en Australie, mais là c'est vraiment serré les uns contre les autres. Le terrain était propre et bien rangé, les employés très sympa par contre les sanitaires ont besoin de sérieuse renovation. Bien que propres, ils sont vieux et abîmés. Tout est à refaire.
La piscine est petite mais fait son travail pour se rafraîchir, le camp de cuisine est petit mais correspond à la taille du camping. Pas le mieux agencé que j'ai vu.
Pour le même prix j'ai eu de meilleurs campings.

On ne sait pas pour les chambres car on était en van.
Super bien situé. Tout se fait à pied.
Sanitaires propres.

Not overly impressed with this CP, and we have stayed in 100s over the past 3-years. Location is fantastic, with the Port Douglas main swimming beach at your doorstep and the main street of town a 5-minute walk away. But then it goes downhill from there. Most sites were small and really only suitable for an RV, and they certainly packed in side by side. The grounds were clean and tidy, but the bathrooms need to be gutted and rebuilt. i would rate them at 3/10 - missing tiles, mould, peeling paint, cracked sinks, and what irked me in particular was that they were only given a 'backpacker clean only'. Floors, toilets and basins only. Nothing to dry your hands on, no bathmats, smelly urinal. At $70pn I would have expected more. Next time we come this way we'll stay at the caravan park a few 100 metres down the road.
Leuke camping op een perfect locatie voor zowel het stadje als het strand. Relaxte vibe. Sanitair is verouderd maar wel schoon en netjes! Zeker een aanrader!

Horrible. The site is good, and the amenities are great, but the lack of obvious rules unfortunately  means that some people tend to police on their own (Karen’s). If you make any noise what so ever, you can expect to get an angry old lady threatening you with the police. If u make more noise than a mouse, don’t come here.

Very bad service. We called weeks in advance to book a powered site. They told us to was not necessary to book in advance, since there are more than enough spots. When we arrive, everything is fully booked. Ridiculous.

Although colloquially known as Tropic Squeeze due to the small, close together sites, this park was super clean, quiet at night, close to both town and beach, services by great staff.  Highly recommend.

The attention of the reception was good.
Bathrooms clean but a bit old and with some broken things. Needs an improvement. Need more hand wash basins and more hand dryers.
The kitchen was equipped, but the light was turned off early (about 19:30/20hs) and we didn't know how to turn it on.

La atención de la recepción bien.
Los baños limpios pero un poco viejo y con algunas cosas rotas. Necesita una mejora. Necesita más bachas para lavarse las manos y más secadores de manos.
La cocina equipada, pero apagaban la luz temprano (tipo 19:30/20hs) y no sabíamos cómo prenderla.

The place is ok, but the light in the kitchen is too early and at night you can't see anything to cook.
There is a group of people who seem to be living next to the kitchen who have everything messed up.

Beautiful location close to beach and shopping and restaurants.
We booked an unpowered site which was located opposite the camp kitchen , very small no room for an awning to go out .
Extremely noisy as the seasonal workers were up till 1.30am playing music and make loud noises very in considerate to park guests . The facilities were clean .

Nos quedamos en un sitio con electricidad, en nuestra campervan.
La ubicación es perfecta, a dos cuadras de la playa, y cerca del centro, donde hay supermercados, restaurantes, etc.
Todo funciona bien y el lugar está muy limpio. Es tranquilo, sin ruidos molestos en el día ni en la noche.
Los baños y la cocina son un poco viejos, pero están muy limpios y tienen papel higiénico y jabón de manos. Las duchas tienen agua caliente.
Lo recomiendo, fue una excelente estadía.

Perfecte locatie, tussen het strand en het centrum in. De camping is vrij krap, maar het past. De keuken en het sanitair zijn keurig schoon. Jammer dat er een aantal locals en backpackers wonen die zich keuken toe-eigenen, maar verder niks op aan te merken.

Location is perfect, short walking distance to shops and beach. Owners are very proud of their park. Gave us some useful information on tours in the Daintree area.
Facilities are well maintained and last night it was pizza and movie night.
Would definitely recommend Tropical Breeze.
Vraiment un camping pas fou, surtout les unpowered qui sont entassés, même les powered n'ont pas beaucoup d'espaces

Super accueil, ça fait plaisir. On a eu de la chance on a eu la dernière place pour le van. Les emplacements sont les un sur les autres mais c’est le jeu.
Les douches et toilettes étaient vraiment propres, la camp kitchen est bien.
Vous êtes a 2 minutes a pied de la plage, 5 minutes du centre ville à pied, c’est vraiment cool.
Close to the beach and decently close to the harbor, best located caravan park in port douglas, with the tradeoffs being tight, sloping lots (lengthwise) and older facilities.

Stayed here in June, port Douglas is an amazing town with lots of nice bars and restaurants. The camp site itself is very clean, beautiful and well stocked with cooking areas, fridges, etc. Recommend staying here!

We have been staying at the campsite for two nights now and were originally worried as we were booked into the site next to the camp kitchen which had a previous bad review. We have found this spot perfect and have asked to stay in it another night! Close to the amenities and by reversing in still feels nice and private! Camp facilities great and bathrooms clean👍🏻

I stayed at the unpowered tent site during high season for $45, and honestly, I was very disappointed.
My site was directly in front of the shared kitchen — and it was the only site in that spot.

Even on a Monday night, people were playing music and drinking until around 10pm. It was incredibly noisy.
For $45, I expected a better experience. It was so loud that I actually wondered if my site should’ve been priced lower than the others.

The showers were fine — no complaints there.
Maybe the powered sites are better, but I wouldn’t recommend the tent site if you’re looking for peace and quiet.

However, if you enjoy socializing and don’t mind the noise, it might be a good fit for you.

Great place to stay in Port Douglas. The campsite is close to beach and city centre. Also very friendly staff that are willing to take some extra effort to make your stay more comfortable. Would come again!

The managers are a credit to the park and were amazing and it’s close proximity to town but that’s about it .. the owner really needs to spend a little money upgrading everything instead of trying to find more spaces to squeeze more people in .. no wonder it’s known as tropic squeeze… the unpowered sites looked like a shanty town with backpackers living there
Lovely caravan park. Back gate to a 2 min walk to beach. 15 min walk to town and so many eateries. Clean amenities and friendly staff.
Toller Platz in guter Lage
Had a really good time here. Great and clean amenities. Enjoyed the proximity to the ocean! Thank you for the kindness, Tanya!! :)
Excellent

The location is great to walk into town.
The amenities are old however they are kept clean.
The sites are tight (8.3m caravan) but shady if you like that.

Planned on staying here for one night but ended up staying a few days longer cause of car trouble, the people that work there were very helpful and understanding of our situation by helping us have a look at what could be wrong with the car and letting us stay a bit longer after the regular checkout which was very nice, definitely a great place to stay given that next to the very nice personnel, all of the sites, toilets, showers and the camp kitchen were very nice!!
Great location

Schöner Campingplatz mit tollen Bäumen und Palmen  in sehr guter Lage zum Strand und auch zum noch nahen Ortszentrum. Durch eine Hintertür ist man in zwei Minuten am langen Sandstrand und in 15 Minuten in der Restaurantmeile. Wer abends nicht mehr zurücklaufen möchte für den gibt es mehr als genug günstige Shuttledienste. Auch Sanitäranlagen und die Gemeinschaftsküche sind in gutem Zustand. Wir waren in der Nebensaison da und hatten so jede Menge Schatten und  Platz. Die Stellplätze sind jedoch sehr eng gesetzt. In der Hochsaison dürfte es eher eng werden. Man steht dann Camper an Camper.

Our stay at the Tropic Breeze Caravan Park was fantastic. Although we experienced a lot of rain, that was simply due to the season.

The reception staff welcomed us with great friendliness and provided excellent recommendations on local activities and the best places to eat.

The only minor issue was a communication problem via email. We had sent a spontaneous inquiry but didn’t receive a response. When we stopped by the next day, we found out that everything had been prepared for us—we simply needed to show up. As it turned out, the issue was on my end, as my email account had caused the problem.

해변에 위치해서 산책하기도 좋고
시설이 깨끗해서 좋다.

Sehr nette Betreiber und schöner Stellplatz für unseren Van.
Alles sehr sauber und ordentlich, die sanitären Anlagen sind aber etwas in die Jahre gekommen.
Fußläufig ist der Strand und das Zentrum von Port Douglas erreichbar.

Fantastic  location wAlk to town.5 mins
Gate at property  to access beach front (swimming  enclosure) great camp kitchen..pool..staff great.
Don't miss it if your camping🙂
10/10, we traveled up the East coast in a camper, and out of every campground we visited, the staff here were the most helpful and friendly.
We camped for a night - Tanya was super helpful and accommodating.
Good spot, great people that work there
On est empilé les uns sur les autres.. une étoile en plus pour la piscine

All the staff are super friendly and helpful. Disregard reviews saying lots small, big enough for 22ft van with awning out. Super close to Four mile beach which has a net and is patrolled. Port Douglas shops and restaurants easy walking distance. Although  bathrooms dated they are clean. Clearly cleaned daily unlike some caravan parks.

This is a very small park with older style but clean amenities.

PRO’s: very close to town so you can walk or ride from this park everywhere, access to beach from back gate, nice pool to cool off in.

CONS: Our site against the fence with overhanging trees had bats in them at night eating and dropping food and poop onto our caravan making a mess. Feedback to reception was we understand you cannot control the bats but we would have appreciated  a heads up about them as this would have influenced our choice to stay at the park.  Due to not knowing and 2 sleepless nights and a van to clean  at the car wash we left earlier than planned which was disappointing.

We stayed here for 5 nights to recover from the flights from UK. It was a great choice as from arrival to departure the staff could not have been more helpful. |The amenities were clean and tidy although the men’s shower lacked pressure.|It was a short walk to the beach and the town centre.|The pitches are very close together although it didn’t make our stay less pleasant.|I’d definitely recommend and would stay here again
Good value for the price. Friendly staff. Clean amenities.

This is campsite has a great location in Port Douglas and is close to the fabulous four mile beach and is a short walk from the shops, bars and eating places in the centre of town. For this reason it does get booked up very quickly, so book ahead to avoid disappointment. The facilities are a little tired, but they are well used, work and were clean.
Lovely setting good distance 2 the beach & restaurants 👌

Uns hat es hier wirklich gut gefallen. Ja, die Toiletten und Duschen sind etwas in die Jahre gekommen, aber dafür immer sauber. Wir haben hier zwei Nächte verbracht und die Lage zum Strand und den ganzen Restaurants ist super. Auch die Inhaber sind wirklich sehr sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Wir würden definitiv wieder kommen!
Very friendly and helpful staff and great location

CONCRETE SLAB CONTRACT TO SIGN ????

Had to sign a contract  about cracking concrete slab,  so take pictures on your phone people !.
Very strange after travelling and staying in parks for over 20 years that's definitely a first 😉

Very small old park very tight sites.

Great location just a short walk to Four Mile Beach and town centre, small park with small sites for vans/trailers, very old amenities which desperately need upgrading (or replacement). Expensive for the quality of park compared to others in the region.

This was our first camp site that we visited on our 3 week trip and we all agreed that it was the best.  Had all the facilities that you would need, no frills but kept clean.  Can't speak highly enough of owners and staff, they were simply the best. And, Port Douglas is only a 4 minute walk, a great town with loads to offer.  It was a most welcome town and its people were a credit to the place.  A great place to undertake a snorkel swim in great barrier reef and a trek to Daintree Rainforest.  Highly recommend this place.  A very warm welcome awaits you from everyone here.

Clean and  well maintained.  Not noisy at all.  Close to beach and town. Would definitely recommend.
Only thing is the shower heads. Far to low unless you are a child.
Schöne Stellplätze, sauber und guter Standort.

Small campground small sites great location |Amenities are old and I'm not sure how they can look clean with tiles etc falling off|We camped behind tennis club which was very busy and loud music emanating on a Thursday night |Very helpful staff |Book in early!|Walk to all restaurants and 4mile beach
Overly expensive considering the crowded nature of the park and the small caravan sites
Staff is super friendly and very helpful. Stayed here for a couple weeks and had a pleasant experience. Will be back!
Très bon rapport qualité prix.
Brilliant park - friendly woman in reception, very helpful, nice park, two mins to beach, swimming pool, spotless amenities.

Friendly camperground, well set up. Does not feel busy even when full. Enough amenities, always clean.
Appreciate the open kitchen with basic provided as foil, wrap paper, oil and the large fridge.
Really close to the beach and a little 15min walk to marina / main shops.

Great site, well located close to the centre of Port Douglas. Plenty of bathroom facilities which were kept pretty clean throughout our 4 nights. Staff helped us park when arriving as it was a little tight but we didn't feel packed in as each site comes with a concrete slab. Swimming pool. Kitchen had no communal use items but we had everything we needed. Area was quiet at night. Laundry available for $4. No complaints really.
Overall great camp, but site are too close from each-other for my liking.

The facilities block should have been demolished 10 years ago. They are closed for 2 hours every morning and still look dirty afterwards. A lot of time.is spent blowing leaves but it could be better spent on doing some painting and repairs. The location is great, which is why they are able to charge the highest rates of any campsite on QLDs west coast. Be prepared for cramped sites with no privacy and very poor facilities.
Great little campground with super friendly staff and clean amenities. Would definitely recommend if you need a stop over in Port Douglas.
We used our own Campervan. Bathrooms are old and variable in cleanliness. Small park so you’re up close to your neighbours. Well located.

Great campsite near to the beach, restaurants and shops all within walking distance. Good spacious sites with power and water plus good facilities including the pool. Helpful staff and a pretty relaxed environment all round, much recommended!
Great, affordable caravan park in a brilliant location in the heart of Port Douglas. The staff are friendly and helpful and happy to have a chat about how to make the most of your time in paradise.

An sich gut gelegener Campingground. Einkaufsstraße gut zu Fuß erreichbar. Strand in der Nähe. Eigentlich verfügt der Campingground über eine Tür, durch die man schnell zum Strand kommt.  Allerdings war diese bereits abends um 17:30h schon abgeschlossen. Weswegen man einen riesigen Umweg zum Strand laufen musste. Küche verfügt über zu wenig Sitzgelegenheiten. Stellplätze sind alle sehr dicht beieinander.
Waschmaschine waschen nur im Kaltprogramm, weswegen unsere Wäsche nicht wirklich sauber wurde. Aber Personal war sehr nett und hilfsbereit

Great park and exceptional staff. Back gate access to a beautiful spot along the 4 Mile Beach, with swimming nets and lifeguards on post.
Will be returning that’s for sure.
Easy check-in, very good equipment, nice staff and good service👍👍

It's a really great place to stay. Walking distance to the centre of town.
Wonderful friendly staff highly recommend staying here

Februar2024: Nahe am 4 Miles Beach und nahe an Port Douglas. Strand, Hafen, Marina, Restaurants und Shops fußläufig erreichbar. Am Strand gibt es eine  bewachte Stelle zum Baden. Wir waren erst für 2 Nächte dort und haben um 2 weitere Nächte verlängert. Auch der Sonntagsmarkt war schön. Der Mossman Gorge im Daintree National Park ist mit dem Auto gut erreichbar. Wir kommen gerne wieder!

April 2024:  Wir sind wiedergekommen. Der erste und der letzte Step unserer Australien-Rundreise war hier. Wir haben es sehr genossen, heute alles zu Fuß machen zu können: Strand,  Shopping und Restaurants, alles ist sehr nah am Tropic Breeze.
Ein schöner Tag!!

Ach ja: Der Platz ist gleich an einer Straße gelegen, aber trotzdem ruhig. Die Amenities sind nicht neu, aber in Ordnung, sauber.
Die sites sind groß, das WiFi ist relativ stabil. Alles in allem recht entspannt und schön hier. Die Schwimmstelle am Strand ist ganz nah.

A great caravan park situated not far from the beach or shops, both within walking distance.||Facilities are older but very clean and tidy.||Good size parking under well established trees offering good shade.||Friendly helpful hosts.||Access to the beach is out the back gate, across the road and through a park.||There were reports of a 4.5m Crocodile seen at the beach in the week we were there but people were still swimming between the flags patrolled by lifeguards.||We stayed 2 nights on our way up to Cooktown.

Mooie eenvoudige camping. Op loopafstand van de zee en iets verder van de winkels, restaurants en de haven.
Prima locatie om vzn alles te ondernemen in, op of onder water.
Der Service ist nicht kooperativ.
Have stayed in the units here for 15 + yrs , great value , friendly people within the park and very central , no need for a car , local bus , out the back gate and over the road to 4 mile Beach 👍
Not very cozy.
Well kept, great ammenities, friendly staff, convenient location. 5 Stars!!
We stayed in cute little park between the trees 🌳.  Lovely greeting. Has a pool, close to Port Douglas Central. And allows pets.
Great little caravan park friendly staff close main shopping area short walk to beach & netted swimming spot

The lovely owners of this park are the most beautiful people. Took our big car and boat in as no places in Dougles had the room for our big rig. They were so helpful and kind they let us use a site to leave both car and boat while we stayed next door. Don't be afford to drive the long way around guys it's a beautiful drive. If we were towing the van we would of stayed here hands down. The park is close to town and very clean with beautiful powered and unpowered spots. Cute pool and the long time campers staying even gave us tips on where to fish. 5 stars from us ✨️
Great owners....best location

The location was great, however the sites are far too small barely fitting your caravan and car with just enough space to to maneuver around. Very outdated and the dump point was rough. Pipe in a wall which leaks and unpleasant. Our caravan took a beating covered in those green ants and droppings from the trees. Only good thing is location. Service was good, but I do think there were better sites for a caravan and we got pushed against the trees and between a hundred vans

A great spot and lovely camp. A very quick 2 min walk to 4 mile beach it’s a perfect place to relax for a few days while exploring Port Douglas. Facilities were good and we felt safe and had good size space for unpowered site. They have a deal if you stay three nights!
Very nice place
Clean amenities, kind staff and a comfortable campsite. The location is great! Only een minute away from the beach and a 5 minute walk to the Main Street.
Very good food and nice people in a quiet street with some nice ambient music and some air.
Great place to stay for a few days away. Clean facilities, amazingly friendly and helpful staff. Very friendly atmosphere. Close to everything that Port Douglas has to offer.

Geweldig om vanaf de camping de wandeling Four mile beach te doen, naar Rex park en haven.
Personeel, voornamelijk Kim, heeft er voor gezorgd dat we een heerlijke dag op het great barrier reef hebben meegemaakt.

We booked here last minute for our spontaneous visit to Port Douglas - we couldn’t recommend enough. The staff are lovely, facilities are clean, lots of great little touches that make a difference. Also a 2 minute walk to four mile beach - such a great location. We loved it that much we extended another night!
Will definitely tell our friends / stay again in the future 😄

Très bon accueil, sanitaire très propre, proche de la plage et de Port Douglas.
Excellent camping 😀
Sanitaire propre, emplacement pour les vans assez serré, mais un bon camping dans l’ensemble

Somewhat crowded and in parts, the toilets and showers, a little tired although spotlessly clean; a nonetheless excellent camping experience. The location is unsurpassed for a PD camp ground being a short walk to 4 mile beach and Macrossan street. In the morning we pop out the back gate towards the beach to ZanDers Beach Cafe for breakfast and coffee. Later, off to Hemingway's Brewery in the marina, which is dog friendly 😊 (the other bars on Macrossan are not)
Great spot, straight out onto the beach, a block or so from the centre of town. Yep the bathrooms dated but they're sparkling clean. Small park with everything you need.
Friendly staff, amenities clean , small sites

After a difficult time at Peppers Resort next door, we went to Tropic Breeze Caravan Park. In an emergency to seek accommodation.  The proprietor was fantastic and welcomed us and made room for our camper on no notice.  She was so helpful and a delight to deal with.  The park is clean and amenities great. Highly recommend this park in Port Douglas to all.

Great location, very close to the action at Port Douglas. We had a powered site, also with town water access and grey water drainage. Sites are very clean.  Amenities tidy and well maintained, but showing their age a bit. Only issue was we were on the main road side, which was quiet overnight but road noise started early in the morning.  All up a good little spot to access Port Douglas.

Amenities are tired and in serious need of an upgrade. The shower I had was probably the most inconsistent water pressure and temperature I’ve had after 4 months of being on the road. Be prepared to get scaled or blasted with cold water. The only thing this park has going for it is its location and proximity to the beach and Main Street. That being said an unpowered site is certainly not worth $45. As there is limited accomodation options for vans in Pt Douglas this is really your only option. Next time I might just risk the fine and free camp.
This is the most Beautiful Park.Lynne and Jack are most  welcoming and helpful.. just spent an awesome day relaxing listening to and watching the Karloo's dance  mmm paradise

Excellent park. Loved the proximity to the Main Street of port Douglas. Loads of grey nomads taking up much of the bookings at this time of year but we managed to squeeze in a few days. Caravan sites are squeezy and if you don’t mind your neighbours very close it’s the perfect park. 4 mile beach is just a street away all within walking distance. Tours can pick you up from the park too if you need. I loved this park. Everyone was so friendly and so eager to help or offer advice felt very safe. Amenities are clean. Highly recommend.
Fabulous place

Great family park, close to the beach shops restaurants etc. very friendly staff in the office, Cathy and Moira , Roger does a great job cleaning up the grounds and keeping everything in great shape. We have been visiting this park for a few years and love being here.

Great park in an excellent  location. Moria in the office is extremely friendly offering lots of information and Roger is doing an excellent job in keeping the grounds and amenities clean also assists parking caravans if required. Keep up the great work.

The Good, location is unbeatable for Port Douglas, friendly staff, clean amenities, semi outdoor camp kitchen, ample clothes line, established trees.
The Bad, sites are tight, amenities are showing their age, some backpackers talk loudly in camp kitchen area till late and we were unpowered just 10m away.
On my Favourites list !

What a fantastic park!!!! Walking distance to town and beach very very close. Amenities clean, park well maintained. Moira, Kathy & Kim in the office are always happy to help and Roger & team do a fantastic job with the maintenance and cleanliness of the gardens and park. Would definitely stay here again.
Location was perfect. Walk to beach, centre of town, marina, a delightful little caravan park.

Terrific little caravan park with a fun mix of backpackers, young families and nomads. Best location in town and 150m to the fabulous Four Mile Beach. Roger, groundsman, is the hardest working bloke in the place and he does a terrific job keeping everything in order and everyone happy.
